final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a "大话西游" movie remake in 90s Hong Kong cinema style (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 90s Hong Kong cinema aesthetic — exact film stock and stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 embracing and kissing on a city wall as central focus, 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing in the distance
Subject: must include 至尊宝, 紫霞 (embracing/kissing), 牛魔王, 唐僧
Scene/backdrop: must include the city wall setting with distant figures visible
Lighting/mood: needs a romantic yet nostalgic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a 90s Hong Kong cinema color direction — exact grading is yours
Materials/textures: must include film grain texture
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
